data.content: (username: tom) hello can you help me ?
Hi tom! Of course, I'd love to help. What can I do for you today?
(username: tom) actully i want to logout but i dont know from where ?

Oh, I can definitely help you with that, tom! To log out of your Oppi Wallet account, just head over to the **settings tab**. You'll find a logout button at the very bottom of the list there. Just click on it, and you're all set! 

Just a friendly reminder: it's always a good idea to back up your wallet phrase before logging out, just to be extra safe!
